data.name: University Days - Season 2
data.detailed_description:
🎓 Welcome to Semester 2 — Where Nothing Stays Hidden

A new semester. A campus full of ambition, desire, and people with things to hide. And somewhere out there, someone watching your every move.

University Days Semester 2 is a choice-driven adult visual novel set in the messy, electric world of university life. Navigate power games, complicated relationships, and a deepening conspiracy as you build — or burn — your reputation across campus.

Back from Season 1 or stepping onto campus for the first time, it doesn't matter — Semester 2 is a complete standalone experience. All 18+ episodes come as free updates throughout Early Access.

❤️‍🔥 Your choices shape everything.

Who you trust. Who you pursue. Who you push away. Your relationships, your reputation, even the scenes you unlock — all of it shifts based on what you do. Small decisions leave echoes. You live with the consequences here.

🕵️‍♀️ Someone Is Watching

'X' was watching you last semester. Now they're making moves. New clues, new leverage, new threats with every episode. The closer you get to the truth, the more dangerous things get — for everyone.

📱 The Phone Changes Everything

The in-game phone isn't a menu. It's a whole other layer of the story. Late-night texts, Picstagram scrolling, photo swaps, private conversations that would never happen face to face. Some of the semester's biggest moments happen entirely on that screen.

🔑 Key Features

🔥 Story-Rich Adult Scenes Fully illustrated, explicit encounters that are actually part of the story — not afterthoughts. Returning faces, bold new characters, and moments that carry weight.

📱 Immersive Phone & Social Feed Real-time messages, a Picstagram feed, photo exchanges. The things your classmates and teachers would never say out loud — but might type at midnight.

🕵️‍♀️ The Mystery of 'X' Deepens A puppet master with a long game and a lot of leverage. Every episode adds another piece. None of them are comforting.

🏫 New Classes, New Power Plays Miss Varela is volatile. Miss Cross is calculating. Every teacher on campus has an agenda, and what you let slip in their presence has consequences.

🧠 Choices That Echo Your past decisions reshape future scenes, open new paths, and permanently close others. This isn't a story you can course-correct your way through.

💋 Bonus Gallery & Unlockables Over a dozen standalone scenes — fantasies, alternate dynamics, moments that exist just outside the edges of the main story.

🌍 Nine Additional Languages French, Italian, Polish, Portuguese, Spanish, German, Russian, Chinese (Simplified), and Turkish.

Multiple episodes available at launch. All 18+ episodes arrive as free updates throughout Early Access — nothing else to buy.

This game contains explicit adult content for players aged 18 and over.

data.short_description: A new semester brings new drama. Outwit scheming faculty, survive volatile roommates, and navigate campus power games in this adult visual novel. Every choice matters in Semester 2's branching storylines. EARLY ACCESS – EPISODES 1–6 AVAILABLE NOW
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 土耳其文*, 義大利文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 +
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHZ Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9 Compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Version 10.11+
  • 處理器: 2.0GHz Core 2 Duo (64 bit only)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
